channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Mental Models for Developers — Finally Explained
item.description: How five mental models—queueing theory, negative feedback, opportunity cost, Pareto, and amortized analysis—turn reactive firefighting into proactive system design, with real benchmarks and fixes.

item.title: RAG in Production: Why Your LLM Keeps Hallucinating (and How to Fix It)
item.description: How to build a RAG system that doesn’t hallucinate in production, with real code, benchmarks, and the mistakes I made first.

item.title: Ship production-grade tools in 90 minutes with the best AI coding assistants
item.description: Measure Copilot, Cursor, Claude Code, Codeium and Tabnine on a real Go CLI; includes token counts, edits, CI minutes and binary sizes.

item.title: The Salary Script That Broke My Bangalore Interview Loop
item.description: Nairobi fintech salary negotiation scripts with real AWS dashboards, Python 3.11 counters, and 68% acceptance rates. Includes step-by-step code, failure modes, and tools used in 4 live negotiations.

item.title: Debugging Techniques That Find Bugs in Minutes
item.description: Learn a five‑step method that turns days‑long hunts into 5‑minute bug fixes using binary search, cheap observability, and hypothesis testing.

item.title: Postman vs RestAssured: API Testing Beyond the Basics
item.description: Compare Postman and RestAssured for API testing, with real benchmarks, cost analysis, and a conditional recommendation for different team needs.

item.title: Your dev environment is lying to you — here’s how to fix it
item.description: How to stop debugging environment differences and start shipping with confidence by running production-like containers locally with live code reload and network simulation.

item.title: How Hackers Bypass Your Firewall Without Touching Code
item.description: How I automated social engineering attacks to expose the real weak link in cybersecurity—your own team’s behavior—and what the numbers from 45 live campaigns reveal about human vulnerability.

item.title: Kafka Isn't for Data: It's for Distributed State Sync
item.description: Kafka isn't a message queue—it's a distributed state journal. Learn how to use it for coordination, not just streaming.

item.title: Manual vs Automated Penetration Testing
item.description: Manual vs automated penetration testing: which catches more critical flaws? I compared time, cost, and real breach data from Nairobi fintech projects.

item.title: React Native vs Flutter: 2026 Verdict
item.description: React Native vs Flutter in 2026: real performance data, team impact, and a blunt take on why one still wins for most apps.

item.title: Tech Role Boom
item.description: Fastest growing tech roles in cloud computing, cybersecurity, and data science

item.title: Docs That Don’t Suck: A Dev’s Guide
item.description: Developers skip docs because they're broken, not because they're lazy. Here's how to build documentation that's actually used — with real tools, metrics, and incentives.

item.title: Layoff Trends
item.description: Tech layoffs: 30% of jobs automated by 2028

item.title: Prompt Engineering
item.description: Improve language model accuracy with prompt engineering techniques

item.title: AI Agents
item.description: AI agents automate tasks, make decisions, and interact with humans

item.title: SQL Simplifies Code
item.description: Simplify application code with SQL

item.title: React Showdown
item.description: React vs Next.js vs Remix: Choose the right tool

item.title: Machines Fail
item.description: AI systems still struggle with tasks requiring human intuition and empathy

item.title: Lazy Load
item.description: Improve web app performance with lazy loading and code splitting
